teacherGuide.conceptGu: ભાગાકાર = fair share. 12 cookies, 3 friends — each gets? Groups બનાવો physically. ÷ = split into equal groups. Multiplication reverse!
teacherGuide.conceptEn: Division is sharing equally / splitting into groups. It's the reverse of multiplication.
teacherGuide.storyGu: 'Pizza 8 slices — 4 friends share equally. Each gets? 8÷4=2. Robot distribute coins equally — same!'
teacherGuide.scriptGu: '12 LEGO bricks — 3 friends. Each friend same number. Deal out one by one — count each pile!'
teacherGuide.tipsGu: 💡 Physical objects deal out — cards, coins, LEGO. See the equal groups. Then connect to ÷ symbol.

questions.textEn: 6 apples shared between 2 friends — each gets?

questions.textGu: 🤖 Robot ના 15 batteries — 3 robots share equally. Each gets?
questions.textEn: 15 batteries shared equally between 3 robots. Each gets?
